source: const record = {}; record.beta = 2; record.alpha = 1; ({ keys: Object.keys(record), json: JSON.stringify(record) });

async function main() { const chained = await Promise.resolve(2).then((value) => value + 3); const settled = await Promise.allSettled([Promise.resolve(1), Promise.reject('nope')]); return { chained, settled }; } main();
async function main() { const first = fetch_data(1); const second = fetch_data(2); return [await first, await second]; } main();
async function main() { try { await fetch_data(1); return 'unreachable'; } catch (error) { return [error.name, error.message]; } } main();
